prompt: Control branch on turn sequence node: choose action.
why_v1: On the turn, this hand prefers pot control, so checking is cleaner than forcing extra pressure.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This turn is a pot-control spot, so checking keeps the pressure manageable instead of forcing another bet.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Betting here pushes past the hand's control value, but checking keeps the pot manageable on the turn.
